ham: Hello, your salary of ₹80,000 has been credited to your account ending 1234 on 07-Apr-24. Your current balance is ₹300,000. No action is required.
spam: Dear User, your income tax refund of ₹1,500,000 has been approved. Pleas submit your bank details at <URL> within 24 hrs to claim. If you do not act quickly, the refund may be forfeited.
